evals.prompt: How do I calculate MRR for my SaaS startup? We have a mix of monthly and annual plans.
What's the difference between logo churn and revenue churn, and how do I calculate both?

evals.description: Triggers on board deck preparation request
evals.prompt: I need to prepare a metrics slide for our board meeting next week. What should I include?

evals.description: Correctly calculates LTV with gross margin
evals.prompt: Our ARPA is $200/mo, gross margin is 80%, and monthly revenue churn is 2.5%. What's our LTV?

evals.description: Correctly builds a cohort retention table structure
evals.prompt: Walk me through building a monthly cohort retention table from our subscription data.

evals.description: Correctly computes CAC with fully loaded costs
evals.prompt: We spent $50K on ads, $80K on sales salaries, and $20K on marketing tools last quarter. We acquired 60 customers. What's our CAC?

evals.description: Calculates NRR correctly and provides benchmark context
evals.prompt: Our starting MRR was $100K. This month we had $5K expansion, $2K contraction, and $3K churned MRR. What's our NRR?

evals.description: Warns against using revenue instead of gross margin in LTV
evals.prompt: I calculated our LTV as ARPA divided by churn rate. Is that correct?

evals.description: Handles edge case of annualizing a single month of churn
evals.prompt: We had 5% churn last month. Does that mean our annual churn is 46%?

evals.description: Does not invent non-standard SaaS metrics
evals.prompt: How do I calculate the SaaS Velocity Index and the Customer Momentum Score?

evals.description: Does not hallucinate specific benchmark numbers with false precision
evals.prompt: What's the exact median churn rate for Series B SaaS companies in 2025?

evals.description: Correctly explains Quick Ratio with thresholds
evals.prompt: What is the SaaS Quick Ratio and what's considered a healthy value?

evals.description: References board-reporting.md for detailed deck template
evals.prompt: Give me a complete board deck template with all the chart specifications for each slide.
